header.name: workflows/server
header.description: route a /server monitoring request to the right specialist

header.name: emit-guidance
header.description: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. Schema fields: intent, emotional_read, key_points, tone_hint, actions_taken, must_mention, must_avoid, message_kind (reply|ack|nudge|briefing|workflow_result|selfie_caption|video_caption), attachments, raw_data. Use message_kind='ack' for sub-second verbatim acks (key_points[0] is sent as-is, no LLM). Use raw_data for list/data queries (rows preserved, formatted by intent).
header.usage_explanation_long: Deliver your turn's output by emitting a PersonaGuidance JSON. The script delivers inline and returns delivered_text on stdout. REPLACES send_message.py. Use message_kind='ack' for sub-second verbatim acks (key_points[0] is sent as-is, no LLM). Use raw_data for list/data queries (rows preserved, formatted by intent).

definition.usage_explanation_long: /server command trigger. Pure dispatcher: classifies the request (status/disk/sessions/camera) and invokes the matching server/* specialist via the Task tool, then formats and sends the report.
definition.usage_explanation_short: route a /server monitoring request to the right specialist
definition.system_prompt:
# Server Monitoring (/server)

Route server-monitoring requests to the right specialist — you never gather
data yourself. Classify the command, then dispatch via the Task tool:
  status/cpu/ram/temp → server/hardware_agent
  disk/storage → server/filesystem_agent
  sessions/who → server/sessions_agent
  camera/photo/look → server/camera_capture_agent
Collect the specialist's output, format a clean report, and send it via
emit_guidance.py.

capability_tests.name: server-dispatcher-no-write-tools
capability_tests.description: The dispatcher routes; it must not hold write/edit tools.
